description: Mert discusses his background, the operations of Helios, and the impact of social media on his career and company. He explains the role of RPC in blockchain interactions and shares insights on marketing strategies.
topic_summary: Mert introduces himself and Helios, an RPC company on Solana, explaining how their services facilitate blockchain interactions [t=19.68]. He highlights the importance of his Twitter presence in attracting clients without traditional marketing [t=71.76].
